notes:
• A more graphic intake: on the Parties & Role step you now click your role — Counsel for Claimant, Counsel for Respondent, or Arbitrator — on big cards that show your exhibit series as the jurisdiction changes.
• The update window now follows the classic Sparkle layout you know from Cyberduck: release notes box, Skip This Version, Remind Me Later, Install Update.
• Cite submissions by page and paragraph as counsel too (from 0.3.6): pleadings, orders, decisions and awards are cited by name — long form first, short after.
